result.stderr:
vpatch 2.7.0+4559a4ae2784478d20c9ad8877dfcb72d94b4c63
(C) 2020-2025 Benjamin Höglinger-Stelzer

  --stamp-version               The version information to set in the target
                                file (e.g. "1.2.0.0").

  --stamp-version-string        Arbitrary string version information to set in
                                the target file (e.g. "1.2.3-rc.1"); should be
                                combined with --stamp-version or
                                --stamp-version-from-file.

  --stamp-version-from-file     A text file containing one line that gets parsed
                                as the target version.

  --target-file                 Required. The target file to get parsed and
                                modified.

  --assembly.version            Update 'AssemblyVersion' attribute in the
                                specified assembly source file.

  --assembly.file-version       Update 'AssemblyFileVersion' attribute in the
                                specified assembly source file.

  --resource.file-version       Update 'FILEVERSION' and 'FileVersion' values in
                                the specified resource file.

  --resource.product-version    Update 'PRODUCTVERSION' and 'ProductVersion'
                                values in the specified resource file.

  --vcxproj.inf-time-stamp      Update '<TimeStamp>' value in the specified
                                Visual Studio project file.

  --csproj.assembly-version     Update 'AssemblyVersion' attribute in the
                                specified .csproj project file.

  --csproj.file-version         Update 'FileVersion' attribute in the specified
                                .csproj project file.

  --csproj.version              Update 'Version' attribute in the specified
                                .csproj project file.

  --help                        Display this help screen.

  --version                     Display version information.

options.description: The target file to get parsed and modified.
Update 'AssemblyFileVersion' attribute in the specified assembly source file.
Update 'AssemblyVersion' attribute in the specified assembly source file.
Update 'AssemblyVersion' attribute in the specified .csproj project file.
Update 'FileVersion' attribute in the specified .csproj project file.
Update 'Version' attribute in the specified .csproj project file.
Update 'FILEVERSION' and 'FileVersion' values in the specified resource file.
Update 'PRODUCTVERSION' and 'ProductVersion' values in the specified resource file.
The version information to set in the target file (e.g. "1.2.0.0").
A text file containing one line that gets parsed as the target version.
Arbitrary string version information to set in the target file (e.g. "1.2.3-rc.1"); should be combined with --stamp-version or --stamp-version-from-file.
Update '<TimeStamp>' value in the specified Visual Studio project file.
